violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Containers and boxes of food stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw beef and chicken above ready to eat vegetables in the prep cooler on the cook line.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Several wiping cloths in the kitchen left out of any sanitizing solution after being used.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine in the back of the kitchen needs to be cleaned.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the reach in freezer by the pop dispenser needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Table top underneath the flat top needs to be cleaned.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Hand sink in the server area was being used to hold cloths used to wipe down tables.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors throughout the kitchen, under equipment and under prep tables need to be cleaned.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Outside opening door on the North side of the building has visible light coming through the bottom of the door.
